title: Market Analyst - AI Trainer - Freelance - 8-20 hrs/week
matched_skills: Market research & business analysis (Minth Group - Market Intelligence Specialist)
missing_skills: Senior-level designation (CV reflects working student / junior analyst roles)
AI trainer or AI evaluation experience
core_responsibilities: Review and refine AI-generated outputs on market analysis, business insights, and data interpretation
Evaluate AI responses for relevance, depth, and alignment with professional analysis standards
Draft realistic market analysis scenarios drawn from professional experience
Create scenario variations from multiple stakeholder perspectives (analyst, executive, client)
Identify gaps, oversights, or weak reasoning in AI-generated market content
recommended_emphasis: Highlight Market Intelligence Specialist role at Minth Group (EMEA/APAC competitive intelligence and executive dashboards) as primary match for senior market analysis requirement
Emphasise data-driven decision-making experience across multiple industries (e-commerce, FinTech, manufacturing, shipping)
Showcase C-level data storytelling and cross-functional stakeholder communication as evidence of professional-grade analysis quality
Frame HSBC Strategy PMO financial analytics work as business analysis deliverable experience
Mention any self-directed use of AI tools in current workflows to partially address the AI trainer context
